findings.title: SQL injection in findUser
findings.body: username concatenated into the SQL string allows injection.

findings.title: Missing null check on user
findings.body: findUser may return undefined; user.password then dereferences null/undefined and throws.
findings.recommendation: Guard for a missing user before accessing fields.

findings.title: Plaintext password comparison
findings.body: Password compared with == in plaintext; hash with bcrypt and use a constant-time compare.

findings.title: Unguarded JSON.parse
findings.body: JSON.parse(raw) throws on malformed input and is unguarded.
